title: S1: the coverage gate derives its ground truth from a git-pinned blob, not a hand-authored constant
action: Per F1 and the repo's own promoted pattern (docs/knowledge/patterns/20260722-a-coverage-gate-derives-ground-truth-it-never-compares-two-hand-lists.md). Replace scripts/okf_migrate.mjs's hand-authored ANCHOR_REGISTRY with a DERIVED inventory: each migrated area records a git pin (commit sha + path of its PRE-MIGRATION source), and --check extracts the anchor set by re-scanning that blob at check time via `git show <sha>:<path>`, using the SAME extraction the existing --inventory mode uses. Requirements: (a) the derived inventory must reproduce EXACTLY the shipped counts — advisor-protocol 26 (4 B, 9 R, 6 E, 7 P) and critical-patterns 47 — and the check output must keep the same PASS/FAIL wording so the chain entries are unchanged; (b) a missing/unresolvable blob, an empty extraction, or a git failure is a LOUD typed failure with exit 1, NEVER a silent empty set that would make every area trivially 0/0 green — this is the whole point of the fix, so it needs its own explicit test; (c) the pin registry maps area -> {sha, path} and is the only hand-maintained part left, so the check must ALSO assert the pinned blob still parses as the expected shape; (d) keep --inventory working for an unmigrated source (reads the working-tree file) so the next cells can use it before their stub lands. Determine the correct pin for advisor-protocol (the commit before a0ea0cc turned it into a stub) and for critical-patterns (the commit before b0d495d) — verify by running the derived extraction against those blobs and matching 26 / 47. RED-FIRST: write the new tests (derived counts match shipped; missing blob = loud exit 1; empty extraction = loud exit 1; unmigrated source still inventoried from working tree) and capture the red run before implementing.

truths: node scripts/run_verify.mjs exits 0 (65 suites) — both existing gates still PASS, now from the DERIVED inventory
red evidence: the new tests failed before implementation (verbatim)
derived extraction against the pinned pre-migration blobs yields exactly 26 (advisor-protocol) and 47 (critical-patterns) — counts quoted in the trace with the shas used
a missing or unresolvable pin exits 1 with a typed error and NEVER reports 0 anchors as a pass — demonstrated by a deliberate bad-sha run quoted in the trace
ANCHOR_REGISTRY's hand-authored anchor lists are GONE from the file (only the area->{sha,path} pin map remains)
prohibitions: never let an empty or failed extraction read as a pass (the gaming hole this cell exists to close)
do not change the PASS/FAIL output wording the chain entries depend on
do not touch docs/knowledge/ content in this cell — this is gate machinery only
no new runtime dependency; git is invoked via child_process, already used elsewhere in scripts/

trace.dropped_reason: premise falsified by the F2 advisor consult: the extractor f2-1 was to reuse is format-blind (onboarding 22 rules -> R0; 2 of 9 areas -> 0 anchors), so its only oracle passed by construction. Re-cut as f2-1b under F8-F12
